name: ChillAxe Waverly
about: ChillAxe Waverly is a dual-venue entertainment complex offering indoor golf and axe throwing experiences. The golf facility features two state-of-the-art simulators with 12x10 ft screens and shot analysis technology, while ChillAxe provides three private axe throwing lanes with electronic scoring. Both venues operate under a simple pricing model with hourly bay rentals and league options. The space caters to a wide range of activities from casual play and practice to competitive leagues and group events, with an on-site bar offering beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic options.
why_golfers_like_it: Two high-tech simulators with detailed shot analysis
Year-round practice with driving range and putting green
Flexible hourly pricing not based on per-person rates
Leagues and events for competitive play
On-site beverage service and welcoming atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Customers can bring in their own food
Wide selection of beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic drinks served on-site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No clubs? No problem! Rental clubs are available for $5.00

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: Customers are allowed to bring in food, but drinks must be purchased from ChillAxe

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for playing 18 holes

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, both the golf and axe throwing venues welcome players of all ages and skill levels
